label: Performance tires (UTQG 200+ treadwear)
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.76 (cheat sheet)
note: Must be 200 treadwear or higher and fit per Street wheel rules.

label: Aftermarket wheels (stock width, ±1" diameter)
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.78 (cheat sheet)

label: Wider wheels / any diameter (width per class)
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.88 (cheat sheet)
note: Max width depends on ST class.

label: Wider 200TW tires than stock allows (width per class)
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.88 (cheat sheet)

label: R-comp / DOT tires below 200TW (e.g. Hoosier A7)
ruleRef: SP cat., Solo Rules p.104 (cheat sheet)

label: Wheels — any size, any width
ruleRef: SP cat., Solo Rules p.104 (cheat sheet)

label: Aftermarket shocks/struts (stock spring rates & mounting)
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.78 (cheat sheet)
note: Street shock allowances are more restricted than ST/SP (e.g. remote-reservoir limits) — verify details.

label: Aftermarket anti-roll bar — ONE end only (front OR rear)
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.80 (cheat sheet)

label: Alignment within factory adjustment range
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.81 (cheat sheet)

label: Coilovers / lowering springs
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.89 (cheat sheet)

label: Anti-roll bars on BOTH ends
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.89 (cheat sheet)

label: Camber bolts / camber plates
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.91 (cheat sheet)

label: Suspension/steering bushings (non-OE)
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.90 (cheat sheet)

label: Strut bar / tie bar (2-point bolt-on)
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.87 (cheat sheet)

label: Drop-in air filter element
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.82 (cheat sheet)
note: Filter element only — no 'cold air' intake kits in Street.

label: Cat-back or axle-back exhaust
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.82 (cheat sheet)

label: Battery replacement (with hold-down)
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.81 (cheat sheet)
note: Relocation behind seats is a Street Touring allowance (p.92).

label: Cold air intake (to throttle body / turbo inlet)
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.93 (cheat sheet)

label: ECU reflash / tune
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.94 (cheat sheet)
note: Reprogrammed PCM/ECU OR changed fuel pressure regulator.

label: Exhaust headers / high-flow cats
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.93 (cheat sheet)

label: Limited-slip differential (one)
ruleRef: ST cat., 2026 Solo Rules §14.10.K
note: Not allowed in EST except factory viscous units; AWD may replace one diff (SST–DST); GST 2WD only (§14.10.K).

label: Engine / transmission mounts
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.95 (cheat sheet)

label: Radiator / fan upgrade
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.95 (cheat sheet)

label: Clutch / lightweight flywheel
ruleRef: SP cat., Solo Rules p.113 (cheat sheet)

label: Standalone ECU / fuel system / ignition replacement
ruleRef: SP cat., Solo Rules p.110 (cheat sheet)

label: Emissions equipment removed (cat delete, etc.)
ruleRef: SP cat., Solo Rules p.111 (cheat sheet)

label: Engine or drivetrain swap
ruleRef: SM cat., Solo Rules p.118 (cheat sheet)

label: Added turbo/supercharger (not factory)
ruleRef: SM cat. engine allowances, Solo Rules §16
note: Treated as an engine modification beyond SP scope; verify exact SM/SSM placement.

label: Brake pads / shoes
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.80 (cheat sheet)

label: Big brake kit / brake lines
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.88 (cheat sheet)

label: Brake cooling ducts
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.89 (cheat sheet)

label: Aftermarket front seat(s)
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.86 (cheat sheet)

label: Aftermarket steering wheel
ruleRef: ST cat., Solo Rules p.86 (cheat sheet)

label: Driver seat belt / harness
ruleRef: Street cat., Solo Rules p.76 (cheat sheet)

label: Rear seats removed
ruleRef: SM cat., Solo Rules p.120 (cheat sheet)

label: Radio/stereo removed
ruleRef: SP cat., Solo Rules p.103 (cheat sheet)

label: Small spoiler / splitter
ruleRef: SP cat., Solo Rules p.102 (cheat sheet)

label: Aero wing
ruleRef: SM cat., Solo Rules p.120 (cheat sheet)

label: Fenders modified/replaced for tire clearance
ruleRef: SP cat., Solo Rules p.100 (cheat sheet)
